data.name: _openFileDialog.Filter
data.value: All Files (*.*)|*.*|All Supported Files (*.izbk;*.json;*.db;*.sqlite;*.sqlite3;*.db3;*.s3db;*.sl3;*.gnucash)|*.izbk;*.json;*.db;*.sqlite;*.sqlite3;*.db3;*.s3db;*.sl3;*.gnucash|IshanBooks Company File (*.izbk)|*.izbk|JavaScript Object Notation (*.json)|*.json|SQLite3 Database File (*.db;*.sqlite;*.sqlite3;*.db3;*.s3db;*.sl3)|*.db;*.sqlite;*.sqlite3;*.db3;*.s3db;*.sl3|Comma-delimited (*.csv)|*.csv|PDF Document (*.pdf)|*.pdf|GnuCash Financial Data (*.gnucash)|*.gnucash

data.name: _saveFileDialog.Filter
data.value: IshanBooks Company File (*.izbk)|*.izbk|JavaScript Object Notation (*.json)|*.json|SQLite3 Database File (*.db;*.sqlite;*.sqlite3;*.db3;*.s3db;*.sl3)|*.db;*.sqlite;*.sqlite3;*.db3;*.s3db;*.sl3|Comma-delimited (*.csv)|*.csv|PDF Document (*.pdf)|*.pdf|Intuit Interchange Format (*.iif)|*.iif|XML Document (*.xml)|*.xml
